description_long: This is a highly ornate, lidded stein-style cup with a robust cylindrical body and a large, curved handle. The exterior surface is adorned with intricate, raised decorative patterns that evoke a sense of craftsmanship, possibly inspired by traditional German beer steins. The hinged lid is domed and features additional relief work, matching the elaborate motif of the body, and is currently shown in an open position. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped, allowing for a secure grip, and is attached at the side opposite the main drinking opening. The base is slightly flared, providing stability, and the interior appears smooth and functional for holding liquids. The entire object has a matte, metallic finish, suggesting it is made primarily of pewter or a similar metal.
description: An ornate, lidded stein-style cup with a decorative relief pattern, large handle, and domed hinged lid, finished in a matte metallic tone.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large handle and the open, domed lid with detailed relief work.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening, the full decorative pattern, and the interior of the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle visible and the lid open, showing the cup's cylindrical form and ornate surface.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the lid and the handle attachment, with the decorative motif wrapping around the body.
